text.message: I think he going on the sheep port no
you both have good coastal spots here

Nah dude I can't promise that lol
I think you can likely rip it
Also love the perfectly spaced placements around the 11 wood
Are they just gonna feed you wood
Dangit I was betting on you having a knight there lol
i will try to help if i can
I hate this for us Orange
That’s why I said brutal board
Orange in my defense I positioned myself down to that spot from my very first placement
You gotta expect me to go for it
I didn’t expect the midddle of the board to get chopped up like that
Look at that, right back in the match
Dude I need 4 VPs to win
Build up to the 6-2, you'll be fine lol
You’ll just plow me there also
You got OWS, a port, and a city
You can’t win with zero expansion lol
Nvm lol all ore in hand stole one from him
How tf I still have 2 VPs lmao
I was giving you the trade you want
Open settle, army, and path to longest road
The amount of 9s this match needs to be studied

He prob gets it also lol
If blue gets army he wins
May want to feed me a dev here
Nah I am straight dude lol
I need to buy a dev next orbit
Looks like gg red blues gotta mono here
or was there one at the start?
